info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: paritApaH = KedaH  ' dunoti dUyate tApe davatIti gatO padam ' (Slo. 22) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tadyaTezIkAtUlamagnO protaM pradUyetEva hA'sya sarve pApmAnaH pradUyante' (CAM॰u॰5.24.3) pradUyeta=dIpyeta jvalet dahyeteti vA
'vidUyamAne (gozWe) cIvaram' (go0 gf0 495) vidyamAne Ardre dUN paritApe paWitastasyAgnyAdisparSena santaptIBavanaM muKyo'rTaH mAnasaH saMjvarastUpacArAt iha virmuKyamarTaM viparyAsayati
'dahyatIva SarIraM me saMvftasya tavezuBiH marmARi paridUyante muKaM ca pariSuzyati' (BA0 BIzma0) paridUyate paritapyate
